title: HG Garden Furniture Cleaner, Outdoor Cleaner & Garden Patio Cleaner Spray for Tables & Chairs, Universal for All Types of Seating, Extremely Powerful & Fast Acting - 500ml
features: HG Garden Furniture Cleaner: A powerful anti-mould and mildew spray which quickly and easily removes stubborn dirt and deposits from all types of garden furniture, outdoor seating and picnic tables
Versatile patio cleaner spray: For all types of garden furniture, including aluminium, rattan, poly-wood, stone and metal. Also safe for furniture made from lacquered and galvanised metals
Extremely powerful: Patio furniture spray removes stubborn dirt and rust, leaving a streak free shine and clean-looking finish. Removes bird droppings, mud, dust, moss, cobwebs and other debris
Garden furniture restorer for all seasons: Keep your outside furniture looking its best all year round with our easy to use patio furniture cleaner, for easy maintenance with no scrubbing needed
Includes: 1 x HG Garden Furniture spray, 500ml. Discover the full range of HG professional household cleaning products, including HG mould spray, multi purpose cleaners and all surface cleaners
description: Product Description HG’s Garden Furniture Cleaner spray is the all-in-one garden furniture cleaner that removes very stubborn dirt and mucky marks from various surfaces. The fast-acting, easy to use spray quickly and easily removes mud, water marks, bird droppings, dust, cobwebs, lichen and mossy deposits from garden furniture, including tables, chairs, rattan sofas and seating sets, patio benches, plastic fold up camping chairs, children's plastic outdoor toys, swing seats and sun loungers. This versatile outdoor cleaner is suitable for restoration and maintenance of all types of garden seating and patio accessories, including plastic, aluminium, cane (look), polywood ,metal and lacquered or galvanised metals. Includes: 1 x HG Garden Furniture Cleaner (500ml spray) How to use: 1. Spray the surface with the outdoor surface cleaner 2. Leave to work for 1 to 2 minutes 3. Wipe off the dirt with a cloth or kitchen roll 4. For very dirty marks or stubborn stains, leave on to work for longer 5. Then loosen the dirt with a brush or sponge and rinse off Keep out of reach of children. Always read the label. Discover HG professional's wide range of specialist cleaning products and all purpose cleaner sprays for your home, office and outside space. Ingredients Furniture Cleaner Box Contains 1 x HG Powerful Garden Furniture Cleaner 500ml See more
